[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [layering](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeLayerManager](../../TextmodeLayerManager.md) / clear

# Method: clear()

```ts
clear(): void;
```

Remove and dispose all user-created layers.

The base layer is not affected by this operation.

## Returns

`void`

## Example
